description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a mix of light wood and gray metal cladding. The structure has two visible stories, with the upper level including a partially open terrace furnished with seating and a table. The front of the house includes a covered carport supported by columns, a driveway, and a landscaped area with shrubs and a circular flower bed. Large, round and rectangular windows are asymmetrically placed on the facade, adding to the contemporary aesthetic. The property is bordered by green lawns, a blossoming tree, and an outdoor picnic table, suggesting a suburban or urban neighborhood setting. The roof is flat, with a pergola-style covering over the terrace and carport.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, gray metal and wood exterior, large windows, a covered carport, and an open terrace. The property includes landscaped greenery, a blossoming tree, and a picnic area.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the gray metal facade with circular and rectangular windows, a terrace with outdoor furniture, and landscaped greenery including bushes and a tree.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the open terrace, the pergola roof structure, and the vertical height of the house, with visible landscaping along the side.
description_view_2: The front view displays the main entry, covered carport, driveway, symmetrical landscaping, and a circular flower bed near the entrance.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the driveway leading to the carport, the picnic table under a blossoming tree, and the side elevation of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with round and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door, small steps, a covered carport with columns, and minimal decorative elements.
